stemHtml: The rotary mode-selector knob of the EFIS ND allows the crew to select…

options.a: a colour palette from a menu.
options.b: an aircraft symbol in the centre or in the lower part of the screen.
options.c: a display that is oriented as either “heading up” or “track up”.
options.d: a side-view, a top-view, or a three-dimensional view.
